channel.title: 文献追踪系统
channel.description: 自动追踪 AI × 物理 / 化学 / 材料交叉领域最新文献

item.title: 磁化循环分析揭示磁场增强析氧反应的机制
item.description:
📚 ACS
👤 Weiyuan Chen, Yu Xia, Boqing Tao, and Wenbo Ju
该工作通过磁化循环分析，探究磁场诱导析氧反应（OER）增强的微观机制。研究从磁性催化剂的磁化行为出发，为理解磁场辅助电催化提供了新视角。

item.title: 科学家利用纽约市光纤网络迈向量子互联网
item.description:
📚 Physics News
该工作围绕利用纽约市现有光纤基础设施构建量子互联网展开。量子互联网基于量子力学原理，理论上可实现物理层面不可破解的通信安全性，从根本上解决传统互联网的安全隐患。该进展标志着量子通信网络从理论构想向实际部署迈出关键一步。

item.title: 基于磁振子奇异跃迁的手机芯片散热新技术
item.description:
📚 Physics News
韩国科学技术院（KAIST）研究团队提出利用磁振子（自旋波）微振动替代电子处理信号的新原理，可显著降低芯片发热与功耗，并实现数GHz范围内的瞬时频率切换。该技术有望解决智能手机高负载游戏与视频流场景下的过热问题，为低发热、长续航智能设备及超低功耗高速计算开辟道路。

item.title: ATLAS首次测量质子-氧碰撞助力宇宙线研究
item.description:
📚 Physics News
ATLAS合作组利用大型强子对撞机（LHC）首次完成质子-氧碰撞测量，为理解宇宙线起源与传播提供新途径。来自外太空的高能粒子持续轰击地球大气层，产生贯穿人体的次级粒子雨，但其母体宇宙线的性质仍未完全阐明。该测量结果有助于约束宇宙线与大气的相互作用模型。

item.title: 化学空间边缘的分子深度学习
item.description:
📚 Nature Machine Intelligence
👤 Derek van Tilborg, Luke Rossen, Francesca Grisoni
van Tilborg等人开发了一种同时预测生物活性和重构分子的深度学习模型，为分布偏移提供了原理性度量。该模型经实验验证，成功发现两种临床相关激酶靶点的活性抑制剂。

item.title: 工程化局域极化无序实现反铁电电容器创纪录效率
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Fukang Chen, Leiyang Zhang, Yule Yang, Ruiyi Jing, Yunyao Huang, Kaiyuan Liu 等17位作者
作者在PbZrO3基陶瓷中引入可控成分非均质性，在保持反铁电调制的同时拓宽极化矢量分布。该方法降低了极化滞后，同时维持高极化强度，实现了反铁电电容器的效率突破。

item.title: 二维α-MnS半导体中S原子位错诱导的室温铁电性
item.description:
📚 Nature Communications
👤 Ling Huang, Jialiang Wu, Chen-Min Dai, Ruofan Du, Junbo Yang, Yanan Peng 等18位作者
在化学气相沉积合成的二维α-MnS中发现了具有面外极化的室温铁电性。该材料表现出大隧穿电阻、高耐久性和长保持时间，为二维铁电存储器件提供了新候选材料。

item.title: 超声-化学计量双调控反位缺陷增强电磁波吸收
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Geng Chen, Shengchong Hui, Limin Zhang, Lechun Deng, Hao Shen, Xuexiang Li, Xiangcheng Li, Qiang Chen, Hongjing Wu
该工作采用超声与化学计量双调控策略调控反位缺陷，以提升电磁波吸收性能。具体机制与性能指标需查阅原文。

item.title: 磁性外尔半金属中贝里曲率增强的反常光能斯特效应
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Zipu Fan, Jinying Yang, Yuchun Chen, Ning Zhao, Xiao Zhuo, Chang Xu, Dehong Yang, Jun Zhou, JinLuo Cheng, Enke Liu, Dong Sun
该研究在磁性外尔半金属中观测到由贝里曲率增强的反常光能斯特效应，揭示了拓扑能带结构与热输运之间的耦合机制。实验细节与定量结果需查阅原文。

item.title: 随机而精确：忆阻器交叉阵列实现鲁棒存内计算、硬件安全与生成对抗网络
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Hyesung Na, Jung Soo Kim, Gimun Kim, Jaewoo Choi, Kang Ryoung Park, Sungjun Kim
该工作基于忆阻器交叉阵列，在器件固有随机性的基础上实现了精确的存内计算功能，并拓展至硬件安全与生成对抗网络应用。具体架构与性能指标需查阅原文。

item.title: 铁电纳米纤维复合负极用于稳定钾金属电池
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Rui Li, Shengwen Li, Zixing Wang, Jilei Liu, Hui Pan, Zhaohui Wang, Mingzheng Ge, Heng Li, Shi Chen
该研究设计了一种铁电纳米纤维复合负极材料，旨在解决钾金属电池中的枝晶生长与界面稳定性问题。具体电化学性能与稳定化机制需查阅原文。

item.title: 机械纳米结构化铁电实现高功率密度柔性集成自充电电容系统
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Seung‐Hyun Heo, Hyunseok Song, Seongwook Min, Jung Hwan Park, Han Eol Lee, Mahesh Peddigari, Srinivas Pattipaka, Chang Kyu Jeong, Daniel J. Joe, Yuho Min, Kwi‐Il Park, Tiandong Zhang, Woon Ik Park, Keon Jae Lee, Jungho Ryu, Geon‐Tae Hwang
该工作利用机械纳米结构化铁电材料构建柔性集成自充电电容系统，实现了高功率密度输出。系统设计与能量转换机制的细节需查阅原文。

item.title: MoO₃₋ₓ/MXene柔性异质界面工程构建内建电场增强电磁波吸收
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Minhao Sheng, Xue Wang, Xiaoqing Bin, Liqian Huang, Ho Ngoc Nam, Lei Fu, Jun Zhou, Xiangyang Liu, Yingji Zhao, Wenxiu Que, Liying Zhang, Yusuke Yamauchi, Yusuke Asakura
该研究通过MoO₃₋ₓ与MXene的柔性异质界面工程构建内建电场，以调控电磁波吸收性能。界面设计与吸收机制的具体细节需查阅原文。

item.title: W-B双电子供体抑制非晶-晶化转变：实现低过电位高稳定性非晶电催化剂
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Xiaodie Wang, Yundan Xiao, Peng Yu, Yong Wu, Xin Jin, Xiaolong Guo, Zhenxiang Cheng
该工作利用钨-硼双电子供体策略抑制非晶材料的晶化转变，制备出兼具低过电位和高稳定性的非晶电催化剂。具体催化体系与性能数据需查阅原文。

item.title: ANF/GMWCNT纤维组装轻质柔性织物用于宽带电磁波吸收
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Tao Chen, Yuefeng Yan, Siqian Liu, Ziyan Cheng, Boshi Gao, Dechang Jia, Yu Zhou, Xiaoxiao Huang
该研究以芳纶纳米纤维（ANF）与石墨化多壁碳纳米管（GMWCNT）复合纤维组装成轻质柔性织物，实现宽带电磁波吸收。具体制备工艺与吸收性能需查阅原文。

item.title: Multiphysical‐Coupled Microfiber Film for Closed‐Loop Electromagnetic Radiation “Perception‐Actuation‐Shielding”
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Yong Xia, Xinran Zhou, Mengjie Wu, Yue Zhang, Xiaojie Wei, Jiehui Zhu, Zechang Ming, Yufan Zhang, Jiwei Zhang, Liming Zhu, Xiaohua Zhang, Jianyong Yu, Jiaqing Xiong
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 32, 20 April 2026.

item.description:

item.description:

👤 Dingyi Yang, Yongjie Xu, Jiawei Liu, Yong Wang, Miao Wang, Yu Zhang, Yang Liu, Yongmei Wang, Qikun Li, Yue Hao, Yizhang Wu
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 32, 20 April 2026.

item.title: Bioinspired Polypeptide Dendrimer‐Modified Thin‐Film Composite Membranes for Selective Lithium‐Magnesium Separation with DFT Insights
item.description:
📚 Wiley
👤 Mehrasa Yassari, Seyedeh Fatemeh Seyedpour, Bamlak Setegne, Amir Aghaei, Behzad Ahvazi, Mostafa Dadashi Firouzjaei, Mark Elliott, Mohtada Sadrzadeh
Advanced Functional Materials, Volume 36, Issue 32, 20 April 2026.

item.title: LDCAP: Robust Image Captioning via Latent Compression and Dynamic Decoder Conditioning
item.description:
📚 Preprints
👤 Veerababu Reddy, Seetharam Poola, Musharaf Shaik, Sai Durga Kistaparapu, Vignesh Sajja
Generating accurate natural language descriptions from images remains a challenging task, particularly when input images are captured under poor lighting conditions such as dim indoor environments, nighttime scenes, or strongly backlit settings. Under such conditions, region-level visual features extracted by standard object detection networks become noisy and unreliable, causing attention mechanisms to focus on uninformative image regions and ultimately degrading caption quality. This paper presents LDCAP (Latent Compression and Dynamic Decoder Conditioning for Image Captioning), a transformer-based captioning model that addresses visual feature degradation directly within the network architecture, without requiring any external image preprocessing or enhancement step. LDCAP incorporates…

item.title: Synthesis of discrete–continuous quantum circuits with multimodal diffusion models
item.description:
📚 Machine Learning: Science and Technology
👤 Florian Fürrutter, Zohim Chandani, Ikko Hamamura, Hans J Briegel and Gorka Muñoz-Gil
Efficiently compiling quantum operations remains a major bottleneck in scaling quantum computing. Today’s state-of-the-art methods achieve low compilation error by combining search algorithms with gradient-based parameter optimization, but they incur long runtimes and require multiple calls to quantum hardware or expensive classical simulations, making their scaling prohibitive. Recently, machine-learning models have emerged as an alternative, though they are currently restricted to discrete gate sets. Here, we introduce a multimodal denoising diffusion model that simultaneously generates a circuit’s structure and its continuous parameters for compiling a target unitary. It leverages two independent diffusion processes, one for discrete gate selection and one for parameter prediction. We…

item.title: Hatsugai-Kohmoto-like Models for Altermagnets and Odd-Parity Magnets
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Konstantin Rickelt, Denis Sedov, Mathias S. Scheurer
arXiv:2604.18684v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce a generalized Hatsugai-Kohmoto multi-orbital model and study its phase diagram and physical properties in the additional presence of perturbations that lift any extensive ground-state degeneracies. The unperturbed, exactly solvable model already displays a rich set of spectral functions, including regimes reminiscent of unconventional magnets. We map the first-order study of additional spatially local multi-orbital Hubbard interactions to a Heisenberg model in momentum space, which leads to symmetry-breaking instabilities already at weak coupling. Interestingly, translational-symmetry breaking orders, such as antiferromagnetism, are excluded. Instead, in addition to ferromagnetism, unconventional p-wave and d-wave magnets occur,…

item.title: Exploring Entropic Orders: High Temperature Continuous Symmetry Breaking, Chiral Topological States and Local Commuting Projector Models
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Po-Shen Hsin, Ryohei Kobayashi
arXiv:2604.18694v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High temperature is usually expected to destroy order: as the Gibbs state approaches the infinite-temperature limit, it becomes an equal-weight ensemble over all states and the system is generically disordered. Recent works showed that entropic order can violate this expectation through coupling to bosons in classical lattice models and quantum field theories, where the ordered states have higher entropy. Here we present new analytic methods for constructing quantum lattice models that exhibit entropic orders. In particular, we construct quantum lattice models with continuous symmetry breaking at high temperature in 1+1 dimensions and clarify how entropic order can evade the Hohenberg-Mermin-Wagner theorems. We also construct high-temperatur…

item.title: P-wave Orbital Magnetism
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yantao Li, Pavlo Sukhachov
arXiv:2604.18695v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Realization of unconventional odd-parity magnets usually requires noncollinear spin textures of the underlying lattice. We propose a different concept of p-wave magnetism that originates from an orbital texture induced by loop currents. The resulting p-wave orbital magnetism is protected by the combined translation and time-reversal symmetry, with even-parity components arising when the symmetry is broken. Our proposal is exemplified by a two-dimensional (2D) lattice model whose energy spectrum contains Dirac points and which is characterized by a nontrivial topology controlled by the magnitude of the loop currents. Since the odd-parity magnetism precludes macroscopic magnetization, we suggest measuring it via orbital Hall conductivity. Our…

item.title: Large Scale Optimization of Disordered Hubbard Models through Tensor and Neural Networks
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jacob R. Taylor, Sankar Das Sarma
arXiv:2604.18711v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We theoretically demonstrate a practical method for tuning randomly disordered 2D quantum-dot grids underlying spin qubit platforms using vision-based neural networks trained on tensor-network generated charge-stability data. We show that a simulatable local 3× 3 window already contains sufficient information to tune the central dot within a much larger array, thereby validating a sliding-window approach in which one tunes a local region and then translates that window across the lattice to calibrate a larger device. This avoids the computationally intractable necessity for obtaining the ground states for large systems with exponentially large Hilbert space. For the experimentally relevant case where only the on-site disorder is unknown, the…

item.title: Proximitized Topological Insulator Charge Island Fabricated via In Situ Multi-Angle Stencil Lithography
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Benedikt Frohn, Tobias Schmitt, Vanessa Serrano, Anne Schmidt, Michael Schleenvoigt, Albert Hertel, Benjamin Bennemann, Abdur Rehman Jalil, Detlev Grützmacher, Peter Schüffelgen
arXiv:2604.18736v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Hybrid superconductor-topological insulator (TI) nanostructures constitute a promising materials platform for exploring proximity-induced superconductivity in systems with topologically protected surface states. A key obstacle has been the realization of clean and well-controlled superconductor-TI interfaces, as TI surfaces rapidly degrade under ambient conditions. Here, we introduce a fully in situ, multi-angle stencil lithography technique that enables the fabrication of proximitized charge islands in TIs. The approach combines selective-area growth of (Bi,Sb)₂Te₃ nanoribbons with angle-controlled deposition of diffusion barriers, superconducting Al, and ultrathin oxide tunnel barriers, allowing scalable fabrication of hybrid nanostructure…

item.title: Dynamical magnetism in the disordered cubic lattice material γ-m̊ Ba₃m̊ CoNb₂m̊ O₉
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fanjun Xu, Ralf Feyerherm, Cecilie Glittum, Thomas J. Hicken, Hubertus Luetkens, Jonas A. Krieger, Cintli Aguilar-Maldonado, Sven Luther, Lucy K. Saunders, Clemens Ritter, Peter Fouquet, Margarita Russina, Karel Prokes, A. T. M. Nazmul Islam, Bella Lake
arXiv:2604.18794v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: γ-m̊ Ba₃m̊ CoNb₂m̊ O₉ realizes a disordered simple-cubic spin-1/2 lattice in which Co²⁺ ions randomly occupy one third of the sites, placing the system close to the site-percolation threshold for magnetic order. Specific-heat, susceptibility, neutron spin-echo, and muon spin-rotation measurements reveal a broad thermodynamic crossover, short-range magnetic correlations, and persistent fast spin dynamics down to at least 0.1~K, with no evidence for static order or conventional spin-glass freezing. Monte Carlo simulations yield a broad distribution of orphan spins, finite clusters, and an infinite network. The calculated orphan-spin fraction (approx 8.8%) agrees well with the weakly correlated spin fraction inferred from magnetization (approx…

item.title: 30°准周期转角双层石墨烯中的朗道能级与磁光学性质
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Masaru Hitomi, Takuto Kawakami, Mikito Koshino
该工作建立了准周期转角双层石墨烯（无平移对称性但具有12重旋转对称性）的朗道能级理论框架。采用准能带方法，通过零场哈密顿量的动量替换引入磁场，将朗道能级直接关联到准能带结构的量子化轨道。研究揭示了弱磁场依赖的近平带以及来自十二个离中心口袋的高度简并能级等独特谱学特征，并计算了磁光导率，表明光学跃迁受12重对称性约束的角动量选择规则支配。

item.title: 笼目反铁磁体的能量景观：多能量尺度的表征
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Brandon B. Le, Seung-Hun Lee, Gia-Wei Chern
该研究探究了笼目海森堡反铁磁体共面基态流形内的能量景观。尽管共面态在谐波阶简并，态之间跃迁需要集体风向标环旋转，其势垒随环尺寸强烈增长。通过精确枚举和minimax势垒计算（小晶格）以及基于构型空间随机行走的统计构造（大晶格，以环长度作为势垒高度的代理），研究揭示了与基本六自旋环相关的低势垒主导尺度，以及更长重排导致的高势垒区域；大系统的统计分析进一步暴露了包括显著六自旋环峰和中间无标度环长度区域的势垒尺度层级，为多重动力学时间尺度提供了自然基础。

item.title: Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄-(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃/MnTe天然异质结构中的近邻磁性
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Owen A. Vail, Shu-Wei Wang, Yasen Hou, Dinura Hettiarachchi, Jean-Felix Milette, Tim B. Eldred, Wenpei Gao, Wendy Sarney, Haile Ambaye, Jong Keum, Valeria Lauter, George J. de Coster, Matthew J. Gilbert, Don Heiman, Jagadeesh S. Moodera, Hang Chi
该工作发现Mn从MnTe向(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃界面扩散时，自组织形成Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄七重层状结构，与交替的(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃五重层共存，这一结构通过扫描透射电子显微镜和深度敏感极化中子反射术证实。磁输运实验与量子磁性模拟揭示，在Mn(Bi,Sb)₂Te₄自身奈尔温度（20 K）之上，其介导的交换场导致(Bi,Sb)₂Te₃/MnTe界面出现反常霍尔效应，界面奈尔温度超过200 K。这种新型磁性界面实现了无需外场的鲁棒确定性自旋-轨道力矩翻转。

item.title: 磁极化子实现异常磁热响应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joshua Ancheta, Caeli Benyacko, Fanghao Zhang, Stephen D. Wilson, Bolin Liao
该研究表明磁极化子为克服磁熵与场响应性之间的典型权衡提供了中间 regime，从而实现异常磁热响应。以EuB₆为模型体系，结合热力学与磁性测量，证明居里温度附近出现的纳米尺度铁磁团簇强烈增强场诱导熵坍缩。这些团簇具有大有效磁矩，能高效响应外场，同时因尺寸小和动态涨落保持可观熵。EuB₆在10-40 K技术重要温区展现出巨大低温磁热响应，具有大的等温熵变和绝热温变。

item.title: 隐形超均匀无序：关联体系中调控电子态与磁相变的新途径
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Akihisa Koga, Takanori Sugimoto
该工作研究隐形超均匀键分布对蜂窝晶格Hubbard模型电子和磁性质的影响。通过非相互作用哈密顿量对角化，证明线性态密度稳健出现，而键分布的隐形特性改变高能区波函数扩展性并显著修饰带边态密度。采用实空间Hartree近似发现，相变始终发生在半金属与反铁磁有序态之间，临界相互作用强度对隐形特性敏感。与准周期蜂窝铺砌的比较进一步凸显结构关联的作用，表明隐形超均匀无序为调控电子态和磁性提供了新途径。

item.title: 辛本征态组态相互作用方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Thomas M Henderson, Guo P. Chen, Gustavo E. Scuseria
该工作提出辛本征态组态相互作用方法，将波函数约束为每个配对轨道具有固定局域辛数：轨道被划分为辛数为零的配对集和辛数为一的自旋集。研究构建了该拟设的有效哈密顿量，并证明高辛数波函数对强关联费米体系具有出乎意料的优异精度，在Hubbard模型和氮分子解离问题上精度与辛数零方法相当或更优。该方法拓展了零辛数方法之外的强关联电子体系描述框架。

item.title: 稀Kondo过渡金属离子替代重费米子化合物电子结构的再审视
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kou Takubo, Shintaro Suzuki, Kohei Yamamoto, Kohei Yamagami, Masafumi Horio, Toshiaki Ina, Kiyohumi Nitta, Masaichiro Mizumaki, Eiji Ikenaga, Yosuke Matsumoto, Hiroki Wadati, Satoru Nakatsuji
该工作对重费米子α-(Yb,Lu)(Al₁₋ₓMnₓ)B₄的Mn 2p→3d X射线吸收谱呈现明显的多重态结构，表明Mn位未占据电子结构为关联高自旋2+态，尽管磁性测量显示Mn位为非磁性。这一悖论结果表明配体场可在局域Mn 3d与周围B 2p轨道间有效出现，这是Kondo效应的预期表现但此前在谱学上未获明确证实。Mn 2p光电子发射则表明占据的Mn²⁺ 3d电子仍表现出巡游和非局域屏蔽特性，源于与导电B 2p及费米能级以下更重Yb 4f和5d带的类Kondo关联。粒子-空穴不对称性激发了对重费米子体系中关联与屏蔽效应的重新考量。

item.title: 范德华磁性半导体异质结构中的超快光致磁电效应
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wenyi Zhou, Ravi Kumar Bandapelli, Hari Paudyal, Bangzheng Han, I-Hsuan Kao, Ziling Li, Yuqing Zhu, Durga Paudyal, Jyoti Katoch, Simranjeet Singh, Roland K. Kawakami
该工作发现WS₂/CrGeTe₃（CGT）双层结构的超快光激发产生与孤立CGT薄膜相反符号的磁转矩，区别于典型的光热激发进动动力学机制。时间分辨磁光克尔效应实验与密度泛函理论及Landau-Lifshitz-Gilbert模拟支持以下机制：光激发载流子跨界面电荷转移改变垂直磁各向异性，进而对磁层产生转矩触发进动磁化动力学。研究还表明WS₂向CGT的光生自旋流也可通过角动量转移触发进动动力学，为II型能带排列的范德华异质结构中磁化的超快操控提供了新途径。

item.title: 生长调控量子材料：过渡金属硫族化合物的热力学、动力学与缺陷工程
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Anzar Ali, Md Ezaz Hasan Khan, Mahmoud Abdel-Hafiez
该综述建立统一的热力学与动力学框架，将过渡金属硫族化合物的生长条件与相稳定性、缺陷能量学和微观结构相联系。研究考察化学势约束如何定义稳定窗口，过饱和与质量输运 regime 如何控制成核与形貌，以及非平衡路径如何实现动力学捕获和多型选择。涵盖块体和薄膜合成方法（化学气相输运、助熔剂生长、物理气相输运、溶剂辅助结晶、化学气相沉积等），强调晶体生长不仅是制备步骤，更是建立化学势、缺陷布居、多型稳定性和亚稳相可及性的热力学边界条件。

item.title: 阻挫笼目晶格上具有补偿亚铁磁特征的三重Q共线态
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kazushi Aoyama, Hikaru Kawamura
该工作理论证明，J₃主导的笼目反铁磁体中出现的三重Q 12子格态可实现无需晶体不对称性的自旋选择性能带分裂。反映多子格特性，局域磁化在三角 plaquette 单元内呈现完全补偿的亚铁磁图案，导致磁子和电子能带中的s波型自旋分裂。这使得绝缘体系在零场下实现反铁磁自旋塞贝克效应，金属体系中实现填充可控的极化态，凸显了阻挫磁体实现新型自旋电子学功能的潜力。

item.title: 自旋-轨道耦合诱导的量子手性相
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daesik Kim, Hyojae Jeon, Seongjun Park, Seungho Lee, Jung Hoon Han, Hyun-Yong Lee
该工作证明在具有XXZ相互作用、自旋-轨道诱导交换相互作用和外磁场的自旋-1/2三角晶格模型中，存在标量自旋手性对称性允许但经典因共线或共面自旋排列而为零、由量子涨落产生的量子手性相。使用无限矩阵乘积态密度矩阵重正化群方法全面绘制相图，识别出多个磁性序与标量自旋手性共存的相。详细磁子分析将非零手性归因于量子涨落，拓展了量子手性磁性的探索空间。

item.title: 亚铁磁石榴石中畴壁脱钉的相干微波驱动
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hanchen Wang, Laura van Schie, Adam Erickson, Lauren J. Riddiford, Davit Petrosyan, Christian L. Degen, Richard Schlitz, William Legrand, Pietro Gambardella
该工作展示了微波场驱动下钉扎在亚铁磁石榴石薄膜中畴壁的线性和非线性动力学共振激发。利用扫描氮空位磁测量术和非局域自旋泵浦测量，识别出源自畴壁在Pt条带定义钉扎线两侧局域振荡运动的磁子能隙内低频模式。微波驱动进入非线性 regime 时，该模式可在降低的外磁场下实现畴壁脱钉。微磁模拟揭示了随驱动功率增加，从局域振荡到钉扎位点间部分再定位、最终完全逃逸钉扎区域的演化过程，建立了通过局域非线性动力学操控磁织构的机制。

item.title: 强电子激发下过渡金属电子熵驱动的密堆积相变
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 S. Azadi, S. M. Vinko, A. Principi, T. D. Kuehne, M. S. Bahramy
该研究表明电子熵 alone 可在固定密度下控制过渡金属的结构稳定性并驱动相变。基于有限温度密度泛函理论构建的15种金属压强-温度相图显示，高温下所有体系均趋向以fcc为主导、hcp为次相、bcc受抑制的密堆积相，构成一种稳健的熵驱动交叉行为。对锰的详细分析揭示了磁有序、电子局域化与晶格稳定性之间的微观关联。

item.title: 有限系统三阶赝相变的谱学特征：本征微观态方法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wei Liu, Songzhi Lv, Xin Zhang, Fangfang Wang, Kai Qi, Zengru Di
该工作提出基于本征微观态框架的谱广义响应方法，用于识别有限系统中难以通过微正则熵捕捉的三阶赝相变。通过构造三阶比率R₃=K₃/(K₂)⁽³/2)探测涨落模式的非对称重分布，在Ising和Potts模型中证明其极值可追踪高阶异常。结合谱投影可区分依赖/独立分支，有效谱维度Rₑff为异常发展提供参与背景。

item.title: 基于μ子自旋弛豫与旋转测量揭示Heusler合金Pd₂ZrIn的超导基态
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kavita Yadav, Anoop M Divakaran, Jumpei G. Nakamura, Tsunehiro Takeuchi, K. Mukherjee
该研究通过电输运、磁化率及μSR测量表征了具有B2型反位无序的立方L₂₁结构Heusler合金Pd₂ZrIn的体相II型超导性，转变温度T_C≈2.2 K。零场μSR证实时间反演对称性保持，横场μSR揭示涡旋晶格形成，超导能隙符合全能隙无节点s波态，Δ(0)~0.33 meV。Uemura图分析表明该合金处于常规超导区域。

item.title: 应变与激光-静电势垒下有能隙石墨烯的量子输运
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Hasna Chnafa, Clarence Cortes, David Laroze, Ahmed Jellal
该研究采用转移矩阵方法研究含能隙、标量势及单轴锯齿应变的石墨烯在激光调制势垒下的电子输运。无应变时提高能隙或势垒降低中心/低边带透射；中等锯齿应变产生Fano型振荡，大应变下消失。上边带中入射能使共振峰右移，势垒宽度增加产生特征振荡。激光场振幅增强透射而高频抑制之，为光电子器件调控提供新途径。

item.title: 观点：磁性赛道上的量子计算
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ji Zou, Jelena Klinovaja, Daniel Loss
该观点文章论述了磁畴壁作为量子计算平台的潜力，强调其高迁移率使其既可作静态量子比特也可作飞行量子比特。文章概述了基于磁畴壁实现通用量子计算的关键要素与材料要求，讨论了具体候选材料平台、尚需完成的实验验证，以及该交叉领域面临的挑战与新机遇。

item.title: 临界磁通以下Weyl点三维Hofstadter-Hubbard模型的超导性质
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pierpaolo Fontana, Luca Lepori, Andrea Trombettoni
该研究探讨三维Hofstadter模型在Hubbard吸引相互作用下的超导相，磁通由临界值Φ_c调控。相图显示Φ>Φ_c时发生半金属-超导体有限相互作用转变，Φ<Φ_c时任意弱吸引即出现BCS型指数能隙标度。临界附近确定了临界指数，揭示了三维Hofstadter系统中磁能带拓扑与配对吸引的 interplay。

item.title: CeIrIn₅中场致反铁磁相变
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Y. Tokunaga, M. -T. Suzuki, S. Krämer, H. Sakai, S. Kambe, H. Harima, D. Aoki, M. Horvatić, I. Sheikin
该研究通过¹¹⁵In核磁共振(NMR)研究重费米子化合物CeIrIn₅在近c轴高磁场下的低温行为。约28 T处场致转变表现为NMR线强度骤降（T₂急剧缩短）及1/T₁显著峰，结合de Haas-van Alphen与能带计算，最自然地解释为Q=(1/2,1/2,0)反铁磁态，磁矩沿c轴反平行排列——这是磁场沿排列方向诱导反铁磁有序的独特案例。

item.title: 用于金属有机框架材料样本感知性质预测的多模态Transformer
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Seunghee Han, Jaewoong Lee, Jihan Kim
该工作提出EXIT模型，结合MOFid与X射线衍射(XRD)实现MOF样本感知性质预测，解决同一样本因结晶度、缺陷等差异导致性质不同的问题。模型先在百万假设MOF模拟XRD上预训练，再微调至实验数据集用于比表面积和孔体积预测。引入实验XRD显著提升了预测性能，优于现有方法。

item.title: 纳米金刚石用于液相化学反应自由基原位监测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Emma Herbst, Sebastian Westrich, Alena Erlenbach, Jonas Gutsche, Maria Wächtler, Elke Neu
该研究展示了氮空位(NV)中心纳米金刚石传感器对液相中短寿命自由基的原位检测。将纳米金刚石沉积于玻璃比色皿内壁，通过T₁弛豫测量成功检测到TEMPO自由基，浓度从0至1 M时弛豫时间从197 μs降至66 μs。检测灵敏度达纳摩尔范围，信噪比1.6-3，为原位监测反应中间体提供了新工具。

item.title: 厚FeSe薄膜中超导性的竞争约束
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ya-Xun He, Xing-Jian Liu, Qun Wang, Ting Chen, Hassan Ali, Jia-Ying Zhang, Bao-Juan Kang, Zheng Zhang, Jun-Yi Ge
该研究发展高通量偏心脉冲激光沉积策略，将羽流不均匀性转化为具有连续梯度参数的FeSe组合薄膜库。发现最大T_c偏离羽流中心，揭示c轴膨胀、化学计量比与缺陷散射之间的竞争关系。对80余厚膜(>50 nm)的系统表征结合可解释机器学习表明，除c轴晶格参数外，化学计量比和无序散射对T_c施加了关键约束，形成狭窄优化窗口而非简单单调关系。

item.title: 耗散Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊ₓ中Bernoulli势导致的空间分辨电压反转
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sharadh Jois, Gregory M. Stephen, Samuel W. LaGasse, Genda Gu, Aubrey T. Hanbicki, Adam L. Friedman
该研究在Bi₂Sr₂CaCu₂O₈₊ₓ霍尔条器件中测量磁输运与临界电流，观察到超临界电流时一边纵向微分电压与另一边幅值相当但符号相反的现象。该效应不受磁场反转影响，且似乎为侵入式电压接触器件特有，归因于运动涡旋中粒子-空穴对称性破缺及相反Bernoulli势的形成——侵入接触在边缘形成热点导致反向涡旋速度。结果对层状超导体耗散电流的组成与流动具有基础意义。

item.title: Mo₂C纳米片中场奇与零场超导二极管效应的观测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wei Gao, Kaixuan Fan, Menghan Li, Jinhao Cheng, Qing Zhang, Shuaishuai Ding, Wenping Hu, Fan Yang, Dechao Geng, Hechen Ren
该研究在化学气相沉积生长的传统中心对称材料Mo₂C纳米片中发现超导二极管效应(SDE)，独特地同时存在场奇SDE与零场SDE。场奇SDE在4 K垂直面内磁场下效率超40%且可调；另一样品中零场SDE在零场与场冷条件下持续存在。面外场扫描证实其内禀性，提出畴壁超电流或电荷密度波序驱动该意外对称性破缺组合，为液氦温度非互易超导电子学提供了空气稳定平台。

item.title: Supermoiré domain-resolved effective Hamiltonians and valley topology in helical multilayer graphene
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kyungjin Shin, Nicolas Leconte, Jeil Jung, Hongki Min
arXiv:2604.19608v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Extending moiré graphene beyond twisted bilayers, helical trilayer graphene has shown topological bands and correlated states with reshaped moiré periodicity. Here we develop a theoretical framework for helical multilayer graphene to investigate its supermoiré relaxation and low-energy electronic structure. Using real-space lattice calculations, we find that relaxation reconstructs the system into locally periodic single-moiré domains, which provide the basis for a continuum description. Within each reconstructed domain, downfolding the first-shell model yields effective Hamiltonians near the Dirac points that reveal how the low-energy spectrum decomposes into folded Dirac sectors. We further evaluate the valley Chern numbers encoded in thes…

item.title: Electronic structure and oxidation states in high-pressure synthesized isostructural CeCN₅ and TbCN₅
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Amanda Ehn, Florian Trybel, Talha Bin Masood, Leonid V. Pourovskii, Igor A. Abrikosov
arXiv:2604.19629v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Understanding the behavior of 4f electrons in materials containing rare earth elements is one of the fundamental questions within condensed matter physics. In this work the electronic properties of isostructural CeCN₅ and TbCN₅, both recently synthesized at extreme pressure, are investigated using Density Functional Theory (DFT) calculations. We include the on-site Coulomb repulsion between localized 4f states within the static DFT+U framework; the DFT+U results are cross-checked with DFT+dynamical mean-field theory (DMFT) calculations within the quasi-atomic (Hubbard-I) approximation. Despite CeCN₅ and TbCN₅ being isostructural compounds Ce and Tb show different oxidation states, 4+ and 3+ respectively. This leads to distinctly different el…

item.title: Intrinsic i-wave altermagnetism in 2D graphene superlattices
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Cuiju Yu, Jose L. Lado
arXiv:2604.19661v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Altermagnets feature unconventional magnetism due to their momentum-dependent spin splitting purely driven by magnetic order, for which a variety of transition-metal-based d-wave altermagnets have been proposed. However, carbon-based altermagnets in graphene structures remain elusive, even though magnetism in graphene nanostructures has been widely demonstrated. Here, we establish a symmetry-guided design principle to engineer i-wave altermagnets in graphene antidot superlattices and demonstrate the emergence of altermagnetic states in specific monolayer and bilayer graphene superlattices. By combining first principles methods and atomistic tight binding models, we show the appearance of an interaction-induced i-wave altermagnetic splitting,…

item.title: Thermal Phase Structure of the Attractive Fermi Hubbard Model with Imaginary Chemical Potential
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Evangelos G. Filothodoros
arXiv:2604.18798v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We study the BCS--BEC crossover of the large N attractive Fermi-Hubbard model on a one-dimensional lattice using the mean field approximation in the presence of an imaginary chemical potential. We show that the crossover is governed by three parameters. The imaginary chemical potential iθ, the temperature via a thermal kernel g(β Eₖ,βθ) and the parameter δᵤ whose sign controls the weak and strong coupling regimes. At the unitarity point (U=U_c), we find a thermal window φ=βθ=2π/3,4π/3 where the gap vanishes while the fermion number N_f, which quantifies the balance between particle-like and hole-like excitations, has a local maximum/minimum. Inside this thermal window BCS and BEC physics are await changes in the coupling to be selected as…

item.title: Cycle holonomy induces higher-order constraints and controls remote synchronization transitions via twisted Laplacian spectra
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lluís Torres-Hugas, Jordi Duch, Sergio Gómez, Alex Arenas
arXiv:2604.19682v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Higher-order interaction networks are typically modeled using hypergraphs or simplicial complexes, where interactions explicitly involve more than two nodes. Here we demonstrate that effective higher-order dynamical constraints emerge naturally on the 1-skeleton of a graph, provided the interaction carries nontrivial topological structure. We study phase-oscillator dynamics with edge phase lags modeled as a U(1)-valued connection. This structure induces a gradient Sakaguchi--Kuramoto-type flow and an associated twisted Laplacian whose spectrum depends on the cohomology class of the connection. We prove that the associated twisted Laplacian admits a zero mode if and only if the connection is cohomologically trivial, that is, when all cycle…

item.title: Regression with Large Language Models for Materials and Molecular Property Prediction
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ryan Jacobs, Maciej P. Polak, Lane E. Schultz, Hamed Mahdavi, Vasant Honavar, Dane Morgan
arXiv:2409.06080v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We demonstrate the ability of large language models (LLMs) to perform material and molecular property regression tasks, a significant deviation from the conventional LLM use case. We benchmark the Large Language Model Meta AI (LLaMA) 3 on several molecular properties in the QM9 dataset and 28 materials properties. Only composition-based input strings are used as the model input and we fine tune on only the generative loss. We broadly find that LLaMA 3, when fine-tuned using the SMILES representation of molecules, provides useful regression results which can rival standard materials property prediction models like random forest or fully connected neural networks on the QM9 dataset. Not surprisingly, LLaMA 3 errors are 5-10x higher than th…

item.title: Classical symmetry enriched topological orders and distinct monopole charges for dipole-octupole spin ices
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Pengwei Zhao, Gang v. Chen
arXiv:2505.07805v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Distinct symmetry-enriched topological orders often do not have classical distinctions. Motivated by the recent progress on the pyrochlore spin ice materials based on the dipole-octupole doublets, we argue that the dipolar spin liquid and the octupolar spin liquid can be distinguished through the magnetic charges of the magnetic monopoles in the classical spin ice regime. It is observed and predicted that the long-range dipole-dipole interaction renders the magnetic monopole of the dipolar spin ice a finite magnetic charge via the dumbbell picture even in the classical regime. For the octupolar spin ice, however, a zero magnetic charge is expected from this mechanism in the classical regime. We expect this smoking-gun observation to reso…

item.title: Hybrid between biologically and quantum-inspired many-body states
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Miha Srdinšek, Xavier Waintal
arXiv:2506.05050v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Deep neural networks can represent very different sorts of functions, including complex quantum many-body states. Tensor networks can also represent these states, have more structure and are easier to optimize. However, they can be prohibitively costly computationally in two or higher dimensions. Here, we propose a generalization of the perceptron -- the perceptrain -- which borrows features from the two different formalisms. We construct variational many-body ansatz from a simple network of perceptrains. The network can be thought of as a neural network with a few distinct features inherited from tensor networks. These include efficient local optimization akin to the density matrix renormalization algorithm, instead of optimizing all th…

item.title: Signatures of rigidity and second sound in dipolar supersolids
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 G. A. Bougas, T. Bland, H. R. Sadeghpour, S. I. Mistakidis
arXiv:2506.22290v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We propose a dynamical protocol to probe the rigidity and phase coherence of dipolar supersolids by merging initially separated fragments in quasi-one-dimensional (1D) double-well potentials. Simulations based on the extended Gross-Pitaevskii equation reveal distinct dynamical signatures across phases. Supersolids exhibit damped crystal oscillations following barrier removal, with the damping rate reflecting superfluid connectivity. A phase-imprinted jump additionally triggers metastable dark solitons, which excites second sound, as revealed by an out-of-phase drift between the droplet lattice and the superfluid background. Our results show a realizable path to dynamically detect the second sound and rigidity of supersolids, as well as t…

item.title: The Effects of Cobalt Doping on the Skyrmion Hosting Material Cu₂OSeO₃
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 M. Vás, A. J. Ferguson, H. E. Maynard-Casely, C. Ulrich, E. P. Gilbert, S. Yick, T. Söhnel
arXiv:2506.23753v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Cu₂OSeO₃ has fascinating magnetic phases that can be easily manipulated through chemical doping. In this work, we report on the synthesis and characterization of Co-doped Cu₂OSeO₃ and its influence on both the atomic and magnetic structure. Polycrystalline (Cu₁_₋ₓCoₓ₎₂OSeO₃ samples with 0 < x < 0.1 were synthesized and the presence of Co was confirmed via elemental analysis. Using synchrotron powder X-ray diffraction, and high-resolution neutron powder diffraction, the incorporation of Co²⁺ into the Cu2 sites was confirmed. Co-doping led to an expansion to the unit cell but shows no apparent changes in bond lengths and angles in the crystal structure. Magnetization measurements showed that the incorporation of Co²⁺ into the Cu2 site led…

item.title: Anyon superfluidity of excitons in quantum Hall bilayers
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Zhaoyu Han, Taige Wang, Zhihuan Dong, Michael P. Zaletel, Ashvin Vishwanath
arXiv:2508.14894v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: The charged anyons of a fractional quantum Hall fluid are necessarily dispersionless due to the continuous magnetic translation symmetry. Neutral anyons, however, can disperse, resulting in a much richer space of possible ``daughter'' states when doped to finite density. We discuss a natural realization of such physics in quantum Hall bilayers, where a finite density of excitons with fractional statistics is argued to give rise to `anyonic exciton superfluidity,' the charge-neutral analog of anyon superconductivity. In a balanced bilayer of two Laughlin ν = 1/3 states, the minimal interlayer exciton carries anyonic exchange statistics. A finite density of these excitons is argued to yield an exciton superfluid stitched to a specific bulk…

item.title: Electronic origin of delicate antiferromagnetism in FeₓNbS₂
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wenxin Li, Jonathan T. Reichanadter, Shan Wu, Ji Seop Oh, Rourav Basak, Shannon C. Haley, Siqi Wang, Joshua E. Chaparro Mata, Elio Vescovo, Donghui Lu, Makoto Hashimoto, Christoph Klewe, Suchismita Sarker, Jessica L. McChesney, Alex Frañó, James G. Analytis, Robert J. Birgeneau, Jeffrey B. Neaton, Yu He
arXiv:2509.03327v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Among the family of intercalated transition-metal dichalcogenides (TMDs), FeₓNbS₂ is found to possess unique current-induced resistive switching behaviors, tunable antiferromagnetic states, and a commensurate charge order, all of which are tied to a critical Fe doping of x_c = 1/3. However, the electronic origin of such extreme stoichiometry sensitivities remains unclear. Combining angle-resolved photoemission spectroscopy (ARPES) with density functional theory (DFT) calculations, we identify and characterize a dramatic eV-scale electronic restructuring that occurs across the x_c. Moment-carrying Fe 3dz^₂ electrons manifest as narrow bands within 200 meV of the Fermi level, distinct from other transition metal intercalated TMD magnets. T…

item.title: CrSBr中可重构层状磁畴结构的光学读出
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Aleksandra Łopion, Pierre-Maurice Piel, Thomas Kliewer, Manuel Terbeck, Jan-Hendrik Larusch, Jakob Henz, Marie-Christin Heißenbüttel, Kseniia Mosina, Thorsten Deilmann, Michael Rohlfing, Zdenek Sofer, Ursula Wurstbauer
范德华磁性半导体CrSBr具有多稳态磁序与强光-物质耦合特性，本工作通过磁反射光谱结合光学多层模型，实现了对层状磁构型的纯光学、非破坏、非接触式读出。外加磁场及与反铁磁体MnPS₃的界面工程可系统调控磁态的多重性与稳定性，其磁构型依赖层厚并呈现级联式中间态，为基于磁组态的信息编码与处理提供了兼容现代光电子技术的读出机制。

item.title: d波交替磁性的原子尺度实空间可视化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daran Fu, Liu Yang, Yi Shen, Kebin Xiao, Yuyang Wang, Wei Jiang, Zhiwei Wang, Yugui Yao, Qi-Kun Xue, Wei Li
交替磁性作为区别于传统铁磁和反铁磁的新磁相，具有零净磁化但破缺时间反演对称性的特征。本工作利用扫描隧道显微镜，在CsV₂Se₂O中提供了交替磁性的原子尺度实空间证据：通过本征自旋缺陷探针，直接观测到单向电子图案和椭圆充电环等标志性对称性破缺特征，且相邻自旋缺陷线呈现相反自旋和长程反铁磁耦合，为从动量空间探测迈向实空间可视化开辟了新途径。

item.title: SU(N) Hubbard模型中渐近量子多体疤痕态的构造
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daiki Hashimoto, Masaya Kunimi, Tetsuro Nikuni
本工作在一维SU(N) Hubbard链（N≥3）中构造渐近量子多体疤痕态（AQMBS），通过将疤痕子空间嵌入辅助Hilbert子空间H_P并识别父哈密顿量，将受限谱生成代数推广至多梯子情形。与此前方案不同，父哈密顿量对应SU(N)铁磁海森堡模型而非自旋-1/2情形，其无能隙磁振子实现原始模型的显式AQMBS；在双空穴-空穴子空间中导出了映射关系，证明了一磁振子色散、正交性、热力学极限下能量方差消失及次体积纠缠熵等性质。

item.title: 活性流体中超均匀性重塑成核与毛细波动力学
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Raphaël Maire
本工作研究非平衡超均匀流体中的成核现象，通过将完整密度场动力学投影到相关集体变量上，揭示成核由非平衡准势而非可逆形成功所支配。由于超均匀涨落被强烈抑制，成核概率不再分解为常规的表面项与体积项；进一步考虑毛细波效应，发现非互易动力学导致细致平衡的明显破缺。该框架可拓展至识别常规活性流体中的非平衡特征。

item.title: 非共线磁体动力学磁化率：新型KKR第一性原理方案及其应用
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 David Eilmsteiner, Arthur Ernst, Paweł A. Buczek
本工作发展了基于Korringa-Kohn-Rostoker格林函数方法的线性响应含时密度泛函理论新实现，用于处理非共线磁体中的自旋激发。在绝热局域自旋密度近似框架下，详细讨论了非共线 susceptibility 计算中Goldstone模式的形成及其数值收敛行为。将该方案应用于交替磁性非共线kagome反铁磁体Mn₃Ir，研究了磁振子色散与Landau阻尼，发现阻尼对磁振子频率的非单调依赖使大动量激发在太赫兹自旋电子学中具有应用潜力，并分析了磁模式的实时实空间动力学及其强手性依赖的衰减特性。

item.title: 基于含时密度泛函理论的非共线磁体中磁振子色散与寿命
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 David Eilmsteiner, Arthur Ernst, Paweł A. Buczek
本工作采用线性响应含时密度泛函理论结合非共线KKR格林函数方法与符号计算代数，研究非共线kagome三角反铁磁体Mn₃Rh的自旋动力学。该方案可处理磁振子衰变为非共线电子-空穴Stoner对的Landau衰减，这是绝热方法无法触及的。计算揭示三个在长波极限线性色散的Goldstone模式对应三条磁振子支，具有非平凡的空间极化；磁振子在整个布里渊区存在，但远离区中心时Landau阻尼显著。值得注意的是，相近动量和能量的磁振子因手性不同可呈现显著不同的衰减，部分以共振特征为主，这源于磁振子本征矢量与内禀自旋极化的相互作用。

item.title: 各向异性光场调控d波交替磁体的非平庸能带结构与自旋极化
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Andrii Iurov, Liubov Zhemchuzhna, Tiyhearah Danner-Jackson
本工作理论研究了非共振光缀饰场下d波交替磁体的能谱、能隙、拓扑与集体性质及线性响应，涵盖dₓ²₋y²和dₓy两种配对对称性。在线偏振辐照下发现有限能隙的打开——这一现象在Dirac材料中未观察到；部分关键性质需在二阶微扰展开中才能揭示。各向异性驱动场导致交替磁体Edelstein磁化率的微妙变化，可实现自旋极化的精细调控。该工作还计算了多种交替磁体的Berry曲率，为光控量子材料设计提供了理论基础。

item.title: 磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发与轴子暗物质探测
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Koji Ishiwata, Kentaro Nomura
本工作研究磁性拓扑绝缘体中的集体激发及其对轴子探测的影响。在含Hubbard项的三维拓扑绝缘体模型中，通过动力学磁化率公式化反铁磁态和铁磁态下磁振子与振幅模的有效作用，其中一个振幅模被识别为"轴子型"准粒子。其与电磁场的有效耦合相比此前估计基本不变或被抑制多达两个数量级，这可能显著改变利用磁性拓扑绝缘体进行轴子搜寻的灵敏度。

item.title: 囚禁离子量子计算机上的数字量子磁性模拟
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Reza Haghshenas, Eli Chertkov, Michael Mills, Wilhelm Kadow, Sheng-Hsuan Lin, Yi-Hsiang Chen, Chris Cade, Ido Niesen, Tomislav Begušić, Manuel S. Rudolph, Cristina Cirstoiu, Kevin Hemery, Conor Mc Keever, Michael Lubasch, Etienne Granet, Charles H. Baldwin, John P. Bartolotta, Matthew Bohn, Justin J. Burau, Julia Cline, Matthew DeCross, Joan M. Dreiling, Cameron Foltz, David Francois, John P. Gaebler, Christopher N. Gilbreth, Johnnie Gray, Dan Gresh, Alex Hall, Aaron Hankin, Azure Hansen, Nathan Hewitt, Craig A. Holliman, Ross B. Hutson, Mohsin Iqbal, Nikhil Kotibhaskar, Elliot Lehman, Dominic Lucchetti, Ivaylo S. Madjarov, Karl Mayer, Alistair R. Milne, Steven A. Moses, Brian Neyenhuis, Gunhee Park, Abigail R. Perry, Boris Ponsioen, Michael Schecter, Peter E. Siegfried, David T. Stephen, Bruce G. Tiemann, Maxwell D. Urmey, James Walker, Andrew C. Potter, David Hayes, Garnet Kin-Lic Chan, Frank Pollmann, Michael Knap, Henrik Dreyer, Michael Foss-Feig
本工作利用Quantinuum H2量子计算机模拟量子Ising模型的数字化动力学，通过充分抑制数字化误差，在严重挑战经典模拟方法的时间尺度上观测到热化现象。非均匀态的弛豫揭示了由近似能量守恒导致的涌现流体力学行为，并计算了相应的扩散常数。通过将模拟重编程至具有周期边界的三角晶格，该工作展示了数字量子物质在探索平衡系统复杂行为方面的潜力，涵盖从热化微观起源到具有奇异涌现性质的有效模型的稳定化。

item.title: 有限能隙势作为热力学Bethe Ansatz半经典极限
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Valdemar Melin, Paul Wiegmann, Konstantin Zarembo
本工作证明热力学Bethe Ansatz方程的半经典极限自然重构有限能隙周期势的代数几何谱。以散焦修正Korteweg-de Vries方程的行波（snoidal）解为例，关联量子场论的Bethe根分布产生由谱端点确定的椭圆Riemann面上的第二类Abel微分——这是孤子代数几何理论的核心结构。半经典参数被识别为底层量子场论（含化学势的Gross-Neveu模型）内对称群O(2N)的大秩极限；谱的解析结构仅由Dynkin图D_N及其大秩极限D_∞决定，与具体可积模型的实现方式无关。

item.title: 有限非阿贝尔对称性的SymTFT研究
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Oren Bergman, Jonathan J. Heckman, Max Hübner, Daniele Migliorati, Xingyang Yu, Hao Y. Zhang
本工作研究D维绝对量子场论的对称拓扑场论（SymTFTD₊₁）对有限非阿贝尔对称群G的拓扑刻画。虽然Dijkgraaf-Witten TFT以G为规范群可显式呈现"电"对称数据，但可能遮蔽磁数据及绝对QFT_D中的非阿贝尔结构（如无法完全脱离拓扑边界的对称算符）。针对3D SymTFT，作者为可表为有限阿贝尔群扩张的有限群构造了离散BF型理论拉格朗日量，以解决上述问题并提供更透明的对称性呈现。

item.title: 单层hBN量子发射体中超越Condon近似的跃迁偶极旋转
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Serkan Paçal, Chanaprom Cholsuk, Mouli Hazra, Çağlar Samaner, Özgür Çakir, Tobias Vogl, Serkan Ateş
本工作通过高分辨能量分辨光谱，发现单层六方氮化硼量子发射体的跃迁偶极矩并非静态性质，而是随光子能量连续旋转——在室温下跨越振动子能级可达40°。该光谱旋转由声子浴耦合驱动，在低温（6 K）下因声学声子布居可忽略而被有效抑制，确认热激活晶格振动为主要机制。第一性原理计算表明，声子位移构型导致跃迁偶极方向系统偏离零声子线，偏差幅度与振动耦合强度成正比，为极化编码量子接口的设计提供了重要修正。

item.title: Engineering quantum optical responses of microtubules through tryptophan-network simulations and ultraviolet spectroscopy
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Lea Gassab, Travis J. A. Craddock
arXiv:2604.18604v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Microtubules host dense ultraviolet-absorbing aromatic networks, suggesting an opportunity to engineer their optical response for biotechnology. Here we assess the feasibility of tuning microtubule fluorescence by combining an excitonic radiative-coupling model with molecular-dynamics-derived microtubule-like assemblies and steady-state absorbance and fluorescence measurements in microplate geometries. Simulations quantify how positional and orientational fluctuations reshape radiative rates and quantum yield, and predict how perturbing the tryptophan network by removing a specific site, adding an extra tryptophan at candidate binding pockets, or using mixed modification fractions can modulate emission. Experiments on porcine tubulin dimers…

item.title: Floquet engineering of spin-spin interactions in a hybrid atomic system
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Daniel Gavilan-Martin, Grzegorz Łukasiewicz, Vincent Schäfer, Mikhail Padniuk, Adam Stefański, Adam Wkeglik, Emmanuel Klinger, Szymon Pustelny, Derek F. Jackson Kimball, Dmitry Budker, Arne Wickenbrock
arXiv:2604.18681v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We demonstrate dynamical control of the effective spin-spin interaction, dominated by Fermi-contact interaction, in a hybrid spin system via parametric modulation. We show that, in an alkali-noble-gas comagnetometer, periodic modulation of the direction of the electron spin polarization with respect to the nuclear polarization leads to a Floquet-induced renormalization of the spin-exchange coupling, governed by a zeroth-order Bessel function. This effect enables continuous tuning and suppression of the effective interaction strength without altering the intrinsic properties of the system. We develop a theoretical model that supports the experimental measurements. The results establish a general mechanism for controlling interaction strengths…

item.title: System Size Dependence of Collisionless Reconnection Rate
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Yi-Min Huang, Naoki Bessho, Li-Jen Chen, Judith T. Karpen, Amitava Bhattacharjee
arXiv:2604.18787v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: It is a widely accepted paradigm that collisionless magnetic reconnection proceeds at a universal fast rate of sim0.1 when normalized to a properly defined reconnecting magnetic field and Alfvén speed, effectively independent of the macroscopic system size. This conclusion, derived primarily from kinetic simulations of classical Harris current sheets with kinetic-scale thickness, stands in contrast to results from forced reconnection and island coalescence, where the rate significantly depends on the system size. Here, we reconcile this disparity by performing a rigorous scaling study using both particle-in-cell and Hall magnetohydrodynamic simulations. We demonstrate that when the global magnetic configuration is self-consistently preserved…

item.title: Inverse designed full-Stokes polarimetric metasurface with simultaneous wavefront sensing for visible light
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ondřej Červinka, Martin Hrtoň, Štěpán Venos, Jakub Lelek, Libor Úlehla, Tomáš Šikola, Filip Ligmajer
arXiv:2604.18879v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Metasurfaces have emerged as a powerful platform for compact optical sensors by replacing bulky lenses with flat arrays of subwavelength nanostructures. In precision optical metrology, the simultaneous mapping of a beam's polarization state and wavefront is crucial for real-time diagnostics of stress-induced birefringence and surface flatness. To achieve this in a compact footprint, existing metasurfaces typically partition their aperture into discrete zones, which inherently restricts the light-gathering efficiency and numerical aperture of the system. Here we demonstrate an inverse-designed metasurface that integrates full-Stokes polarimetry and Shack-Hartmann wavefront sensing within a single, continuous aperture in the visible spectrum.…

item.title: Volumetric Processing of Structured Light Integrated in Glass
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Oussama Korichi, Markus Hiekkamaki, Robert Fickler
arXiv:2604.18885v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Light with complex structures in polarization, phase and amplitude, has attracted a lot of attention in a broad range of applications and fundamental studies in classical and quantum optics. Along with the increased interest in structured light comes a need for efficient modulation platforms operating simultaneously for many modes. Multi plane light conversions (MPLC), i.e., multiple consecutive phase modulations in combination with free space propagation, have enabled such unitary transformations, which are usually built by bulky optical components, limited to scalar modulation, or rely on advanced nanofabrication techniques. Here, we demonstrate an efficient, monolithic MPLC architecture through direct laser writing in standard fused silic…

item.title: Intense tunable terahertz radiation from phase-matched difference frequency generation in strongly magnetized plasmas
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Sida Cao, Matthew R. Edwards
arXiv:2604.18908v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: High-energy terahertz pulses are challenging to produce due to the low conversion efficiency and limited optical damage threshold of nonlinear crystals. Here, we describe the high-efficiency generation of terahertz radiation pulses with tunable frequency and field strengths exceeding 500 GV/m by propagating two-color laser pulses through a strongly magnetized plasma. The field strength is substantially enhanced by utilizing two extraordinary-mode branches to minimize the phase mismatch. We derive the phase-matching conditions and characterize the nonlinear coupling analytically, and validate these predictions with particle-in-cell simulations. These results establish a new pathway toward next-generation intense terahertz sources with perform…

item.title: Integrated Supermode Photonics Enabled by Supersymmetric Transformation
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Kaile Chen, Qi Lu, Yuan Zhong, Jingchi Li, Yuru Li, Zhaohui Li, Chao Lu, Yikai Su, Lu Sun
arXiv:2604.18999v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We report a systematic methodology to obtain supermodes with equidistant effective index distribution and to excite arbitrary target supermodes with high precision. By employing a multi-well optical potential realized by a judiciously designed waveguide array, the supported supermodes achieve maximal spacing and an equidistant distribution in effective index. More importantly, we develop a 2nd-order discrete supersymmetric (DSUSY) transformation method that enables the excitation and detection of two supermodes at the same time and can be extended to any number of supermodes via simple cascading. Together, these findings overcome the long-standing bottlenecks in integrated supermode photonics and provide an intrinsically scalable route towar…

item.title: Neural Operator Representation of Granular Micromechanics-based Failure Envelope
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Jinkyo Han, Payam Poorsolhjouy, Bahador Bahmani
arXiv:2604.19027v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Micromechanics-based granular models are widely used to predict the failure behavior of porous and particulate materials, including concrete, soils, foams, and biological tissues. Although these models offer considerable flexibility through microstructural parametrization and statistical representation, their mapping to macroscopic responses, particularly failure envelopes, is implicit and requires costly nonlinear, non-smooth simulations, where each failure point is obtained by following a loading trajectory. This limitation is further amplified in inverse settings, where one seeks microstructure configurations that reproduce a target failure response. In this work, we propose a differentiable neural operator that learns the mapping from mi…

item.title: Closing the Loop: Deploying Auto-Generating Digital Twins for Particle Accelerators
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. D. Brynes, M. King, K. R. L. Baker, R. Banerjee, R. Clarke, D. J. Dunning, J. K. Jones, M. Leputa, A. E. Pollard, M. Romanovschi, M. Shaw, N. Ziyan
arXiv:2604.19101v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The simulation of a physical system in a virtual replica, known as a digital twin, is a useful way to interrogate the system non-invasively, providing the ability to perform predictive maintenance and surveillance, and to investigate potential novel configurations without perturbing the system. This article presents the implementation of an auto-generating digital twin architecture for particle accelerators: a virtual control system is generated to mirror the physical accelerator hardware, and used to update a simulation model which then feeds back the results into virtual diagnostics. All of the information about the accelerator lattice is cascaded down from a ground source of truth, removing any ambiguity about the naming of parameters bet…

item.title: A flexible start-to-end simulation framework for particle accelerators based on a comprehensive lattice description
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 A. D. Brynes, J. K. Jones, M. King, M. A. Johnson, N. Ziyan
arXiv:2604.19103v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Standardization of data formats in a scientific discipline brings a range of benefits to researchers, as it enables the sharing of workflows and solutions to common problems, provides the foundation for generically useful tools that can be applied across the field, and gives a basis for cross-checking and validation that can be understood by all. Owing to the wide range of possible modes of description of particle accelerator lattices, a standard solution to this problem has not yet been developed for the field, although efforts are underway across the community. This article presents a schema for a comprehensive and generic format for describing particle accelerator lattices, encompassing physical element information, simulation code-specif…

item.title: Why Does Classical Turbulence Obey an Area Law?
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Wael Itani
arXiv:2604.19173v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In incompressible flow the viscous force is solenoidal, whereas the Madelung transform of a spinless Schrödinger equation produces only gradient forces. The two are orthogonal, so viscosity cannot arise from Hamiltonian quantum mechanics alone; an open quantum treatment is required. Reducing the N-body density matrix to its one-body component and closing the dynamics via Born-Markov yields Lindblad jump operators with k² scattering rates, which we unravel via quantum state diffusion (QSD) into a norm-preserving stochastic nonlinear Schrödinger equation. Dissipation and stochastic forcing are not separate ingredients: both come from the same Lindblad operators, and their amplitudes are locked by the QSD structure. The Madelung transform of th…

item.title: Deep-Learning based surrogate models for plasma exhaust simulations -- SOLPS-NN
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Stefan Dasbach, Sebastijan Brezinsek, Yunfeng Liang, Dirk Reiser, Sven Wiesen
arXiv:2604.19223v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurate models of the scrape-off layer are required for the design and operation of tokamak fusion reactors. Scrape-off layer simulations are computationally expensive, difficult to operate and suffer from numerical instabilities. A potential remedy comes in using machine learning models trained on simulations for fast and easy to use predictions. We present a such candidate surrogate model - named SOLPS-NN - to provide recommendations for the methods to construct it. Based on a large dataset of several thousand SOLPS-ITER simulations with reduced neutral fidelity, a variation of machine learning models with differing architectures and scopes are tested. The evaluation shows that simple fully connected neural networks are a suitable archite…

item.title: 电介质中线性磁电响应的传播分类
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Eduardo Bittencourt, Elliton O. S. R. Brandão, Érico Goulart, Danilo H. Spadoti
该工作研究具有线性磁电响应的均匀电介质在几何光学极限下的电磁波传播。在假设各向同性介电常数和磁导率的前提下，保持一般的3×3磁电耦合矩阵αᵢⱼ，推导了极化矢量的程函（菲涅尔）本征值问题，并获得归一化相速度r=v/v_d的紧致四次色散关系。通过将αᵢⱼ分解为迹、对称无迹和反对称三部分，分类了各部分的传播效应：纯迹部分在几何光学领头阶对传播无影响；反对称部分导致可因式分解的四次方程，产生具有解析相速度的两个分支；对称无迹部分通过代数不变量控制菲涅尔波面和偏振混合，具有最丰富的方向依赖性。最后讨论了通过相位敏感透射和共振测量探测相速度移动的可能性。

item.title: 基于DBD作动器的TS波抑制的SDRL控制器实验验证
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Babak Mohammadikalakoo, Sergio Garcia Villasol, Gabriele Salomone, Marios Kotsonis, Nguyen Anh Khoa Doan
该工作展示了无模型单步深度强化学习（SDRL）控制器在平板边界层TS波抑制中的风洞实验实现。控制器采用前馈布局，包含上游参考麦克风、下游误差麦克风以及位于二者之间的DBD等离子体作动器，通过误差信号在线更新策略并实时调整有限脉冲响应（FIR）滤波器系数。TS波由规格相同的上游DBD触发作动器人工引入，采用单频、多频或宽带白噪声输入。实验在消声风洞中进行，使用齐平安装的压力麦克风进行传感和反馈，二维平面粒子图像测速（PIV）验证流场。该工作围绕控制器性能评估展开，详情需查阅原文。

item.title: 二维磁化Yukawa液体中扩散与剪切黏滞性的关系
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 N. Kh. Bastykova, T. S. Ramazanov, S. K. Kodanova
该工作研究外加磁场作用下二维Yukawa液体中剪切黏滞性与扩散之间的相互关联。Yukawa液体作为复杂等离子体的典型模型体系，其输运性质在磁场影响下的行为对理解强耦合等离子体动力学具有重要意义，具体数值结果和理论分析需查阅原文。

item.title: 利用氟化K介子原子在Schwinger极限以上进行束缚态QED检验
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 F. Clozza, S. Manti, F. Sgaramella, L. Abbene, F. Artibani, M. Bazzi, G. Borghi, D. Bosnar, M. Bragadireanu, A. Buttacavoli, M. Carminati, A. Clozza, L. De Paolis, R. Del Grande, K. Dulski, C. Fiorini, I. Friščić, C. Guaraldo, M. A. Iliescu, P. Indelicato, M. Iwasaki, A. Khreptak, J. Marton, P. Moskal, H. Ohnishi, K. Piscicchia, F. Principato, A. Scordo, M. Silarski, D. Sirghi, F. Sirghi, M. Skurzok, J. Sommerfeldt, A. Spallone, K. Toho, O. Vazquez Doce, J. Zmeskal, C. Curceanu
该工作报道了在平均库仑场超过Schwinger极限的强场区域对束缚态量子电动力学（BSQED）的实验检验。利用DAΦNE加速器上的SIDDHARTA-2实验，对氟化K介子原子进行高精度X射线光谱测量（积分亮度22.4 pb⁻¹），观测到涉及4f和3d能级的跃迁，探测到场强与Schwinger极限之比分别为1.11和3.70。测量跃迁能量与最先进的Dirac-Fock计算一致，其中5g-4f跃迁对QED贡献具有约9σ灵敏度，残余偏差为5.8±4.7（统计）±5.5（系统）eV。结果为强场QED区域提供了直接的BSQED检验。

item.title: 金属界面附近Mie颗粒的方向性散射诱导光力
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Semyon Borodulin, Natalia Kostina, Mihail Petrov
该工作研究放置在金属界面附近的谐振电介质纳米颗粒所受的光学力，其中散射同时进入自由空间和表面等离激元（SPP）通道。电偶极子与磁偶极子的干涉导致这些通道中的高度方向性散射，散射诱导力的方向和大小与相应辐射通道的角指向性直接相关。在交叉光束构型中，辐射压贡献被抑制时，光力可在广泛的颗粒尺寸范围内改变近2π，为谐振纳米颗粒的光学分选提供了途径。

item.title: 各向同性湍流的统计场论
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Ahmed Farooq
该工作建立了完全发展各向同性湍流的第一性原理统计场论。对局域角动量场进行精确的Helmholtz分解，揭示出两个正交不同的拓扑相：纵向宏观相干结构的凝聚相（ΦL）和充满体积的横向热浴（AL）。构建哈密顿量并计算这些解耦场的配分函数，证明其相空间的遍历探索是拓扑量子化的，要求自由度严格的1:2均分。将此拓扑投影反演回速度场，分离出严格位于角动量框架零空间的径向速度场，揭示出级联过程中1/3:2/9:4/9的精确分数层次递归划分方案。这一几何约束迫使湍流稳态进入由相化学势相等（μ_Φ=μ_A）支配的严格正则平衡。

item.title: 半醌态的独特结构动力学定义鸟类隐花色素中的信号通路
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Monika Kish, Suchitra Pradha, Jessica L. Ramsay, Paloma Munguía Salazar, Jonathan Phillips, Daniel R. Kattnig
该工作应用氧化还原态分辨的氢/氘交换质谱（HDX-MS）技术，绘制欧洲知更鸟隐花色素4a（ErCry4a）在整个光循环中的构象景观。研究发现光化学还原驱动关键功能节点发生稳健的变构结构转变，包括磷酸结合环（PBL）、突出环（PL）、FAD近端α17螺旋以及C端α22/α23网络。关键的是，研究分离出瞬态半醌（假定的信号物种）的结构指纹：该态表现出独特的非单调构象特征，以PBL和PL的瞬态去稳定化为特点，与全蛋白刚性化的线性结构阶梯假设形成鲜明对比，为连接微秒量子自旋动力学与长程全局蛋白构象变化的信号机制提供了结构基础。

item.title: 分子中核运动与核自旋的磁耦合
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Matthias Diez, Johannes K. Krondorfer, Albert Hirtenfelder, Andreas W. Hauser
该工作发展了描述分子系统中核运动与核自旋之间磁偶极耦合的通用理论框架，该框架基于现代电子结构理论并受电子相互作用Breit-Pauli哈密顿量的启发，区分了核自旋-轨道和自旋-其他-轨道贡献。研究表明，核自旋与高度对称分子赝转动激发的相互作用可能导致NMR光谱中由红外光触发的、实验可观测的超精细分裂，为振动诱导的核自旋效应提供了系统描述。

item.title: PK-4条件下离子尾流介导的尘埃相互作用：广义紧致势表述
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Diana Jimenez Marti, Benny Rodriguez Saenz, Peter Hartmann, Evdokiya Kostadinova, Truell Hyde, Lorin Swint Matthews
该工作提出了适用于PK-4类条件下尘埃与离子尾流系统的稳健广义势模型。现有离子尾流模型（如点电荷和高斯表示）常依赖构型特定参数，限制了普适性。新模型利用分子动力学模拟确定的小系数集，捕捉多粒子间距的势分布，并应用于测试案例和小尺度尘埃动力学模拟，证明其适用于超越弦状构型的广泛尘埃排列，为微重力实验中自组织现象的研究提供了有效工具。

item.title: Lund平面到Bloch球（LP2B）编码：用于量子喷注子结构的对象与极化标记
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Fabrizio Napolitano, Luca Della Penna, Tommaso Tedeschi, Livio Fanò
该工作引入Lund平面到Bloch（LP2B）编码，将理论上干净且稳健的喷注运动学表示直接映射到量子比特态。基于此编码实现了量子树拓扑网络（QTTN），内嵌Lund树的层次结构。在多个基准测试中评估表明，QTTN在极化标记任务上匹配大型经典深度学习架构（如LundNet）的性能，同时在W玻色子和顶夸克标记上保持有竞争力的精度，且展现出增强的可分离性。该编码避免了现有量子机器学习方法在红外和共线安全性、非微扰效应敏感性或可扩展性方面的缺陷。

item.title: 非绝热量子分子动力学的无Oracle量子算法
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Joshua Courtney
该工作提出将非绝热量子分子动力学中的双态哈密顿算符直接作用于计算基，作为一阶量子化的分裂算符传播子，避免了传统oracle模型和谱分解的困难。算法通过动态可观测量（包括吸收和复发光谱、散射截面、布居动力学和量子疤痕）进行验证，推导并优化了多模式和多通道扩展的量子电路，包括多变量势能项和基于分子对称性的图论优化。资源估计显示，在容错尺度上相对于QROM加载架构具有电路深度优势，与量子信号处理变体的定量比较确认Trotter架构保持可扩展的T门优势。

item.title: 基于算符对易性的态制备推进实用量子嵌入模拟用于复杂化学体系
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Dibyendu Mondal, Ashish Kumar Patra, Rahul Maitra
该工作在密度矩阵嵌入理论（DMET）框架内，提出基于算符对易性和能量驱动筛选的动态ansatz构造策略，以克服NISQ硬件限制同时保持基态能量估计精度。通过将全系统划分为嵌入子系统，动态构建各子系统的ansatz并单独求解至所需精度，嵌入哈密顿量以自洽方式更新。该方法为大规模化学真实分子的量子-经典混合模拟提供了可行路径，具体实现细节和数值验证需查阅原文。

item.title: 坡印廷定理、麦克斯韦方程组、狄拉克方程与量子电动力学中的磁矩
item.description:
📚 arXiv
👤 Peter J Mohr
本文研究经典与量子电动力学中电子磁偶极矩与磁场或其他电子相互作用的理论。作者将坡印廷定理推广以纳入磁偶极矩在非均匀磁场中的相互作用能，并相应扩展麦克斯韦方程组以考虑磁偶极矩源。研究表明，基于扩展坡印廷定理的表述与常规量子电动力学表述可给出一致结果，且两种方法均仅用电磁场而无需势函数来表达相互作用。研究聚焦于磁偶极相互作用，不涉及磁单极子。
